channel.title: Flannery, J. E. on DANIELLE COSME
channel.description: Recent content in Flannery, J. E. on DANIELLE COSME

item.title: Study protocol: Transitions in Adolescent Girls (TAG)
item.description:
Citation:
Barendse, M.E.A., Vijayakumar, N., Byrne, M.L., Flannery, J.E., Cheng, T.W., Flournoy, J.C., Nelson, B.W., Cosme, D., Mobasser, A., Chavez, S.J., Hval, L., Brady, B., Nadel, H., Helzer, A., Shirtclif, E.A., Allen, N.B., & Pfeifer, J.H. (2020) Study protocol: Transitions in AdolescentGirls (TAG). Frontiers Psychiatry, 10, 1018.

item.title: Improving practices and inferences in developmental cognitive neuroscience
item.description:
Citation:
Flournoy, J. F., Vijayakumar, N., Cheng, T. W., Cosme, D., Flannery, J. E., & Pfeifer, J. H. (In Press) Improving practices and inferences in developmental cognitive neuroscience. Developmental Cognitive Neuroscience
